title: 007b BUDAPESTEN NAPLO - H
description:
BUDAPEST DIARY -- Der Vorwärtsgänger
Documentary
MTV2, a series of on the spot interviews at various places in the City of Budapest.

Interview: András Péterffy - Jürg Da Vaz, June - July 1998.
camera 1: Juri Burak
camera 2: Lászlo Dörflinger
camera 3: Ernö Nagy
camera 4: Tibor Varadi
editing: Sándor Gréczi
editing: Jürg Da Vaz
directed by Jürg Da Vaz.
filmed on site in Budapest
a handmade DaVaz production© 1998
